Data Set of Agricultural Machine

Source: R/tech-AgriMachine.R
AgriMachine.Rd

A data set containing Agricultural Machine statistics from the Yearbook of Rural, with long data format.

Usage

AgriMachine

Format

A data frame:

province

province, including nation

year

year, begin with year 2010

chn_block4

vars name, in chinese

value

value of variables

units

units of variables

variables

vars name, by coding

Source

https://www.huhuaping.com/

On this page
